rationale: The cited paper appears as a single background citation in the introduction to support a general claim that neuroscientific methods can complement or improve access to consumer knowledge beyond self-report. The citing article does not engage the cited paper's specific framework, challenges, or proposed solutions when developing its hypotheses, methods, or analyses. Its core contribution (template-based neural profiling of brand image) is built and validated independently, so this citation functions as broad contextual positioning rather than a direct intellectual dependency.
